## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What's changing and why. -->

## Type

<!-- Delete the ones that don't apply. Keep at most one or two. -->

- feat — new feature
- fix — bug fix
- docs — documentation only
- chore — tooling, deps, build config
- refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- test — adding or fixing tests
- ci — CI/CD pipeline changes
- build — build system or external dependency changes

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Bullet list. CI build passing is the bare minimum. -->

- [ ] CI build passes
- [ ] Relevant unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manually verified in browser (if web-facing)

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know. Trade-offs, follow-ups, things you punted. -->

<!-- If you discovered something non-obvious along the way, add an entry to
LEARNINGS.md so future contributors don't rediscover it. -->
